title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: CS50 argues that humans remain superior to AI at reliably editing word documents because document formats like .docx have structural logic similar to code. AI struggles to make changes without introducing errors across the document structure, whereas treating documents as software rather than mere text files is necessary for reliable automated editing at scale.
